features.name: LT
features.description: Behavior for lighting applications; interacts with Level Control and timers.

features.name: DF
features.description: When OnOff is FALSE, device enters dead front; other clusters may reject operations with INVALID_IN_STATE.

features.name: OFFONLY
features.description: Device supports only Off command; On and Toggle are unsupported.

action_facts.name: OffReceived
action_facts.description: Off command received by server

action_facts.name: OffApplied
action_facts.description: Off command applied: OnOff set to FALSE

action_facts.name: OnTimeClearedByOff
action_facts.description: OnTime cleared due to Off command

action_facts.name: OffResponseSent
action_facts.description: Response to Off command sent

action_facts.name: OnReceived
action_facts.description: On command received by server

action_facts.name: OnNotSupportedOffOnly
action_facts.description: On command rejected because OffOnly feature is enabled

action_facts.name: OnApplied
action_facts.description: On command applied: OnOff set to TRUE

action_facts.name: OffWaitTimeClearedByOn
action_facts.description: OffWaitTime cleared because OnTime is 0 when On command processed

action_facts.name: OnResponseSent
action_facts.description: Response to On command sent

action_facts.name: ToggleReceived
action_facts.description: Toggle command received by server

action_facts.name: ToggleNotSupportedOffOnly
action_facts.description: Toggle command rejected because OffOnly feature is enabled

action_facts.name: ToggleAppliedToOn
action_facts.description: Toggle changed OnOff from FALSE to TRUE

action_facts.name: ToggleAppliedToOff
action_facts.description: Toggle changed OnOff from TRUE to FALSE

action_facts.name: OnTimeClearedByToggleToOn
action_facts.description: OnTime cleared because OnOff became TRUE due to Toggle

action_facts.name: OffWaitTimeClearedByToggleToOff
action_facts.description: OffWaitTime cleared because OnOff became FALSE and OnTime is 0 due to Toggle

action_facts.name: ToggleResponseSent
action_facts.description: Response to Toggle command sent

action_facts.name: OffWithEffectReceived
action_facts.description: OffWithEffect command received

action_facts.name: GlobalSceneStored
action_facts.description: Global scene stored due to OffWithEffect

action_facts.name: GlobalSceneControlCleared
action_facts.description: GlobalSceneControl set to FALSE

action_facts.name: OffAppliedByEffect
action_facts.description: OnOff set to FALSE by OffWithEffect

action_facts.name: OnTimeClearedByOffWithEffect
action_facts.description: OnTime cleared due to OffWithEffect

action_facts.name: OffWithEffectResponseSent
action_facts.description: Response to OffWithEffect command sent

action_facts.name: OnWithRecallGlobalSceneReceived
action_facts.description: OnWithRecallGlobalScene command received

action_facts.name: OnWithRecallGlobalSceneDiscarded
action_facts.description: OnWithRecallGlobalScene discarded because GlobalSceneControl is TRUE

action_facts.name: GlobalSceneRecalled
action_facts.description: Global scene recalled from Scenes cluster

action_facts.name: GlobalSceneControlSet
action_facts.description: GlobalSceneControl set to TRUE

action_facts.name: OffWaitTimeClearedByOnWithRecallGlobalScene
action_facts.description: OffWaitTime cleared because OnTime is 0 when OnWithRecallGlobalScene processed

action_facts.name: OnWithRecallGlobalSceneResponseSent
action_facts.description: Response to OnWithRecallGlobalScene command sent

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffReceived
action_facts.description: OnWithTimedOff command received

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffDiscardedAcceptOnlyWhenOn
action_facts.description: OnWithTimedOff discarded because AcceptOnlyWhenOn is set and OnOff is FALSE

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffUpdateDelayedOff
action_facts.description: OnWithTimedOff processed in Delayed Off branch; OffWaitTime updated with min

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffUpdateTimedOn
action_facts.description: OnWithTimedOff processed in Timed On branch; OnTime and OffWaitTime updated and OnOff TRUE

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffTimerStarted
action_facts.description: Timer for OnWithTimedOff started

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffResponseSent
action_facts.description: Response to OnWithTimedOff command sent

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffTickTimedOn
action_facts.description: Periodic tick in Timed On state processed

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffTickDelayedOff
action_facts.description: Periodic tick in Delayed Off state processed

action_facts.name: OnTimeDecremented
action_facts.description: OnTime decremented by timer tick

action_facts.name: OffWaitTimeDecremented
action_facts.description: OffWaitTime decremented by timer tick

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffTransitionToOff
action_facts.description: OnWithTimedOff timer caused transition from On to Off

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffTimerStopped
action_facts.description: Timer for OnWithTimedOff stopped

action_facts.name: StartupOccurred
action_facts.description: Device startup or power cycle occurred

action_facts.name: StartupRestorePrevious
action_facts.description: Startup restored previous OnOff value because StartUpOnOff is null

action_facts.name: StartupForceOff
action_facts.description: Startup forced OnOff to FALSE because StartUpOnOff=Off

action_facts.name: StartupForceOn
action_facts.description: Startup forced OnOff to TRUE because StartUpOnOff=On

action_facts.name: StartupToggleToOn
action_facts.description: Startup toggled OnOff from FALSE to TRUE because StartUpOnOff=Toggle

action_facts.name: StartupToggleToOff
action_facts.description: Startup toggled OnOff from TRUE to FALSE because StartUpOnOff=Toggle

states.name: StartupState
states.description: Neutral startup state before OnOff is set; used only for startup transitions

states.name: BaseOff
states.description: OnOff is FALSE; may be in dead-front if DF feature set

states.name: TimedOn
states.description: OnOff TRUE with active OnWithTimedOff timer; OnTime > 0 or == 0xFFFF

states.name: DelayedOff
states.description: OnOff FALSE with active OffWaitTime from OnWithTimedOff; OffWaitTime > 0 or == 0xFFFF

transitions.description: Power cycle with StartUpOnOff=null restores previous OFF state
Power cycle with StartUpOnOff=null restores previous ON state
Power cycle forces OFF on startup
Power cycle forces ON on startup
Power cycle toggles from OFF to ON on startup
Power cycle toggles from ON to OFF on startup
Off command from ON: turns device OFF and clears OnTime
Off command during TimedOn: cancels timer and turns device OFF
Off command during DelayedOff: cancels timer and leaves device OFF
Off command when already OFF: idempotent
On command rejected because OffOnly feature is enabled
On command turns device ON when OnTime not supported

transitions.guard_condition: OFFONLY == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == FALSE
transitions.description: On command turns device ON when OffWaitTime not supported

transitions.guard_condition: OFFONLY == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == TRUE && OnTime == 0
transitions.description: On command turns device ON and clears OffWaitTime when OnTime is 0

transitions.guard_condition: OFFONLY == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == TRUE && OnTime != 0
transitions.description: On command turns device ON and keeps OffWaitTime when OnTime is non-zero
On command when already ON: idempotent
Toggle command rejected because OffOnly feature is enabled
Toggle from OFF to ON when OnTime not supported

transitions.guard_condition: OFFONLY == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == FALSE
transitions.description: Toggle from OFF to ON when OffWaitTime not supported

transitions.guard_condition: OFFONLY == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == TRUE
transitions.description: Toggle from OFF to ON; clears OnTime when turning ON
Toggle from ON to OFF when OnTime not supported

transitions.guard_condition: OFFONLY == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == FALSE
transitions.description: Toggle from ON to OFF when OffWaitTime not supported

transitions.guard_condition: OFFONLY == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == TRUE && OnTime == 0
transitions.description: Toggle from ON to OFF; clears OffWaitTime when OnTime is 0

transitions.guard_condition: OFFONLY == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == TRUE && OnTime != 0
transitions.description: Toggle from ON to OFF; OffWaitTime kept because OnTime is non-zero
OffWithEffect with GlobalSceneControl TRUE: store scene, clear flag, turn OFF
OffWithEffect with GlobalSceneControl FALSE: turn OFF without storing scene
OnWithRecallGlobalScene discarded when GlobalSceneControl already TRUE

transitions.guard_condition: GlobalSceneControl == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == TRUE && OnTime == 0
transitions.description: OnWithRecallGlobalScene recalls global scene, sets flag, turns ON, and clears OffWaitTime when OnTime is 0
OnWithRecallGlobalScene recalls global scene and sets flag; OnTime not supported

transitions.guard_condition: GlobalSceneControl == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == FALSE
transitions.description: OnWithRecallGlobalScene recalls global scene and sets flag; OffWaitTime not supported

transitions.guard_condition: GlobalSceneControl == FALSE && supports_OnTime == TRUE && supports_OffWaitTime == TRUE && OnTime != 0
transitions.description: OnWithRecallGlobalScene recalls global scene and sets flag; timers not cleared when OnTime is non-zero
OnWithTimedOff discarded because AcceptOnlyWhenOn is set and device is OFF
OnWithTimedOff in DelayedOff branch: update OffWaitTime and keep OFF
OnWithTimedOff accepted from OFF when OffWaitTime is 0: enter TimedOn with updated timers
OnWithTimedOff from BaseOn: sets timers and enters TimedOn
Timer tick in TimedOn: decrement OnTime when > 1 and timers not disabled
Timer tick causes OnTime to reach 0 and transitions device to OFF; OffWaitTime set to 0 and timer stopped
Timer tick in DelayedOff: decrement OffWaitTime when > 1 and timers not disabled
Timer tick in DelayedOff decrements OffWaitTime to 0 and stops timer

state_bound.name: PreviousOnOff
state_bound.source: Persistent previous OnOff value before power cycle

state_bound.name: supports_OnTime
state_bound.source: Capability flag: whether OnTime attribute is implemented

state_bound.name: supports_OffWaitTime
state_bound.source: Capability flag: whether OffWaitTime attribute is implemented
